problem id: d7cd3375
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) XOR NOT SHL(5)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  01001111 -> 11111011
  00101000 -> 01111111
  00111100 -> 10111111
  00101110 -> 11011111
  01010010 -> 10011110
  00000100 -> 00111111
  01001100 -> 10111011
  11111001 -> 01111110
  00110011 -> 10101100

query: 10101001
predicted answer: 01101111
